title: Pixel-Tree
description:
This texture-pack is a 32×32 resource pack that provides a stylish experience to anyone who's simply tired of the old Minecraft textures.
- This back doesn't require Optifine.
- Do not repost without permission.
body:
- This is a work in progress, 80% finished. - Do not redistribute my texture pack without my permission. - No Optifine needed.




Good day,

This texture pack is my second one, right after Celestial Zenith (Another texture pack I made), which I have decided to put a lot of work into. It's a texture pack that I've spent years working on with the little free time I have along side my art. As mentioned it is a 32×32 texture pack, however the mobs have an exception because they are all 64×64 which allows for more detail. This texture pack is a mix between realistic and cartoonish styles, and all the textures are hand drawn. Some blocks are even animated. This is rather a personal project of mine to help me improve my art skills. I might remake some textures in the future considering I've gotten better over time which might create a artistic skill imbalance for some of the textures, where some might seem better than others. Minecraft has hundreds of thousands of textures and I have finished 80% so far, which means this texture pack will soon be finished, possibly my last texture pack because they are very time consuming to create and not worth it, lol. You can also visit the original site I posted this on 3 years ago, PlanetMinecraft, which offers more media to scroll through.

Thank you for your time. Best regards, Nitgo
